  • Method Details

    • bankAccount

      public BankRelationship.Builder bankAccount(BankAccount bankAccount)
      The bank account for the relationship. This field must be set on create requests **except** when using the `PLAID_TOKEN` verification method. In which case, the bank account will be retrieved by the service based on the `plaid_processor_token`.

    • bankAccount

      public BankRelationship.Builder bankAccount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends BankAccount> bankAccount)
      The bank account for the relationship. This field must be set on create requests **except** when using the `PLAID_TOKEN` verification method. In which case, the bank account will be retrieved by the service based on the `plaid_processor_token`.

    • createTime

      public BankRelationship.Builder createTime(OffsetDateTime createTime)
      Creation time of the bank relationship.

    • createTime

      public BankRelationship.Builder createTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> createTime)
      Creation time of the bank relationship.

      The resource name of the bank relationship.

      public BankRelationship.Builder nickname(String nickname)
      The nickname of the bank relationship.

    • nickname

      public BankRelationship.Builder nickname(Optional<String> nickname)
      The nickname of the bank relationship.

    • plaidProcessorToken

      public BankRelationship.Builder plaidProcessorToken(String plaidProcessorToken)
      A processor token from Plaid (vendor). Required if using `PLAID_TOKEN` verification method.

    • plaidProcessorToken

      public BankRelationship.Builder plaidProcessorToken(Optional<String> plaidProcessorToken)
      A processor token from Plaid (vendor). Required if using `PLAID_TOKEN` verification method.

      The state of the bank relationship.
